critical_code_review_comments: Backend meeting_provider_service.py correctly implements Teams lobby bypass at lines 185-188: lobbyBypassSettings.scope='everyone' and allowedPresenters='organizer'
Backend meeting_provider_service.py correctly stores lobby settings in metadata at lines 208-209
Backend meeting_provider_service.py correctly enriches Meet metadata with creator_email and creator_name at lines 424-431
Backend Zoom implementation correctly maps start_url to host_url at line 93
Frontend AppointmentDetail.js correctly implements host/participant URL distinction at lines 963-996
Frontend correctly shows amber hint for Meet creator email at lines 999-1003
context_for_next_testing_agent: Host experience improvements fully tested. Key verified features: (1) Teams meetings created with lobbyBypassSettings.scope='everyone' and allowedPresenters='organizer' - stored in meeting_provider_metadata, (2) Meet appointments have creator_email and creator_name from Google calendar connection - displayed as amber hint in frontend, (3) Frontend correctly shows 'Démarrer la réunion (organisateur)' + 'Lien participant' when meeting_host_url exists (Zoom), or standard 'Rejoindre la réunion' when no host_url (Teams/Meet). Note: Existing Zoom appointments don't have meeting_host_url because they were created manually, not via API.
